{"accused_ref": "A1", "source_sentence": "He confessed that from last few years, his wife Smt. Gayatri Bai started indulging in selling of Ganja to needy customers and accordingly cases were booked against her. Later their daughter Kum. Durgeshwari @ Eshika also joined and he also joined for selling the Ganja. In the month of January-2022, he was arrested by Police Mangalhat for indulging in Ganja supplying to his known persons and lodged him in jail. He obtained bail in the Hon’ble court and released from jail. After releasing from jail, he along with his wife Smt. Gayatri bai & daughter Kum. Durgeshwari @ Eshika, all together started selling the Ganja and they used to procure the Ganja from villagers by visiting agency areas of Aaraku and also used to purchase the Ganja at the rate of Rs.10,000/- per KG from villagers in Dhoolpet area. Then he along with his wife Smt. Gayatri Bai & their daughter Kum. Durgeshwari used to sell the same to needy customers in high rate by moving on road at Ganga Bowli road. By selling Ganja, they are earning an amount of Rs.20,000/- in a week. Yesterday i.e., 14.07.2022 at about 18:00 hrs, his wife Smt.Gayatri Bai & daughter Kum.Durgeshwari Bai purchased Ganja weg.1.4 KGs at the rate of Rs.10,000/- per KG from one villager at Jummerath Bazar, Dhoolpet, Hyd and return back to their house. Today i.e., 15.07.2022, morning at about 09:30 hrs, his wife & daughter asked him to sell the said Ganja weg.1.4 KGs at Ganga bowli road, Mangalhat, Hyd and informed him that they will join him after completion of work. Accordingly he took the said Ganja in black colour polythene cover and came to Ganga Bowli area. He sold out about 100 grams of Ganja to needy customers (passers) and earned Rs.2,400/-. At about 10:50 hrs, while he was waiting for needy customers on road, Ganga Bowli, Mangalhat, Hyderabad, meantime they apprehended him. The A.1 shown one black colour polythene cover, which is hold by him in right hand and cash of Rs.2,400/- (towards sales proceedings). He checked the black colour polythene cover and found the contents of Ganja, which has stems, flowers, flowering tops of Cannabis. It appears and the contents smell as Ganja. Checked the weight in digital weighing machine & found the weight of said Ganja as weg.1,300 grams (1.3 KGs) with black colour polythene cover."}
